title: Games
summary: A growing arcade of original browser games built from scratch — Ghostpile (a chain-letter dodge run), Sorta (a daily deduction puzzle), Tabfish (an idle tab-bar fishing game), Askew and more. All playable instantly, no sign-ups.

title: India Infra Atlas
summary: A living map of India's infrastructure, tech, energy & defense news — daily auto-updating pins and corridors on a full interactive map with 3D terrain, rail overlays, measuring tools and a timeline.

title: India Energy Atlas
summary: Interactive maps of India's oil, gas, coal, solar & wind — reserves, production, import dependency, frontier exploration, field depths, costs and feasibility, with live charts.

title: Diff Checker
summary: Advanced text comparison with analytics, history, and file upload (PDF, DOCX, code), plus formatting for JSON, Python, JavaScript and SQL.

title: WordGen
summary: Rewrite anything: paraphrase, fix grammar, change tone, turn rough notes into a better LLM prompt, restyle text as an email, LinkedIn/WhatsApp/Instagram post or tweet, and swap single words for context-aware synonyms. Free offline engine or bring your own API key (Claude, OpenAI-compatible, custom). Ships with a sticky-note Chrome extension.

title: JWT Decoder
summary: Decode and encode JSON Web Tokens with algorithm support and signature verification — a clean jwt.io-style tool.
